description: Number of data mappings; zero is assumed when the dimension is absent
Registered mapping function names; required when NumberDataMappings is greater than zero
Type of the data mapped; double is assumed when absent
Size of each mapped source and target set; ranges are assumed when absent
Concatenated mapped ranges or subsets; required when NumberDataMappings is greater than zero
Paths to mapping callers; required when NumberDataMappings is greater than zero
Inner deterministic block; may be inherited from the default StochasticBlock in an SDDPBlock
